name: monitor
description: Monitor your Claude Code and Codex sessions: a usage dashboard plus a per-project cockpit (goal capture, decision log, live transcript, and needs-your-call bridge).

interface.shortDescription: Usage dashboard + session cockpit for Claude Code and Codex.
interface.longDescription: Two skills in one plugin: a usage dashboard that visualizes Claude Code and Codex sessions, tokens, cost, and model mix; and a per-project cockpit for setting a session goal, logging decisions that diffs cannot explain, streaming the live transcript, and handing needs_your_call choices back to the user.
defaultPrompt: Show my Claude Code usage dashboard.
Start a cockpit session for this project.
